testcase.name: UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-01: Create a standard challenge successfully
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-03: Create a dynamic challenge successfully
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-04: Create a multiple-choice challenge successfully
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-05: Reject a challenge name that becomes empty after trimming
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-06: Reject a category that becomes empty after trimming
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-07: Reject a category longer than 20 characters
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-08: Reject a negative time limit with native validation
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-09: Reject a negative challenge value with native validation
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-10: Reject a dynamic challenge when initial value is below minimum value
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-11: Add a static flag via the Flags tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-12: Add a case-insensitive static flag via the Flags tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-13: Add a regex flag via the Flags tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-14: Delete a flag via the Flags tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-15: Upload and delete a file via the Files tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-16: Add and remove a topic via the Topics tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-17: Add and remove a tag via the Tags tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-18: Create a hint with content and cost via the Hints tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-19: Reject a negative hint cost via browser validation
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-20: Delete a hint via the Hints tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-21: Set a prerequisite challenge via the Requirements tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-22: Set the next challenge via the Next tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-23: Create challenge with name at maxlength boundary (40 chars)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-24: Create challenge with duplicate name → server rejects or handles
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-25: Create challenge with time limit at maximum boundary (30 minutes)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-26: Reject time limit = 0 with browser native validation (min = 1)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-27: Reject time limit exceeding maximum (31) with browser native validation
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-28: Create challenge with max_attempts = 0 (unlimited)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-29: Create challenge with value = 0 (zero-point challenge)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-30: Reject negative cooldown with browser native validation (min = 0)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-31: Reject negative max_attempts with browser native validation (min = 0)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-32: Create challenge with minimum time limit boundary (1 minute)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-33: Create challenge with large max_attempts value (999)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-34: Create challenge with high cooldown value (3600 seconds)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-35: Reject dynamic challenge when decay = 0 (below min=1 native validation)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-36: Create dynamic challenge with logarithmic decay function
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-37: Reject dynamic challenge with negative decay value (min = 1)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-38: Create visible challenge (state = visible, published immediately)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-39: Create challenge with no difficulty set (difficulty unrated)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-40: Create challenge with maximum difficulty rating (5 stars)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-41: Create challenge with minimum difficulty rating (1 star)
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-42: Create challenge with case-insensitive flag from creation wizard
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-43: Add a regex case-insensitive flag via Flags tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-44: Flag Create button is hidden until a flag type is selected
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-45: Create a free hint (cost = 0) via Hints tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-46: Create multiple hints and verify all appear in Hints table
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-47: Edit an existing hint content and cost via Hints tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-48: Remove prerequisite after setting it via Requirements tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-49: Clear/reset the next challenge selection via the Next tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-50: Upload a second file via Files tab and verify count increases
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-51: Create multiple-choice challenge with four choices
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-52: Add multiple topics and verify all persist via Topics tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-53: Add multiple tags and verify all appear via Tags tab
UC03 Create Challenge › CCH-02: Create a docker-backed challenge with deployment settings
